title: Update user onboarding emails
description: Revise the welcome email series to include new branding and updated links.

title: Investigate data-sync latency spike
description: Customers reported stale data last week; preliminary logs point to a possible timeout in fetch_customer_data API.

title: data-sync-nightly failure: fetch_customer_data timeout
description: The nightly data synchronization job (data-sync-nightly) failed last night. The job history shows that the API step 'fetch_customer_data' timed out after 30s, causing the sync to abort. Investigation needed to determine root cause and restore reliable sync.

title: Clean up deprecated API endpoints
description: Remove /v1/legacy/data endpoint and update all internal services to use /v2.
